- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Requirements provided: Node.js Express TypeScript messaging app with MySQL, Redis, rate limiting, Docker, 2 servers, nginx load balancer.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Project scaffolded manually: created directories, package.json, tsconfig.json, source files, Docker files, docker-compose files, nginx config, database init script, README.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented messaging features: auth, messages, caching, rate limiting, Docker setup with 2 servers and nginx.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions specified.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies listed in package.json. Build with npm run build. For Docker, build image.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	No specific task needed; use npm scripts.

- [x] Launch the Project
	For dev: docker-compose up. For prod: docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with setup and API info.
